## Brief

- Core message: The artwork for the Code Breach tower defense game has been significantly updated, bringing a fresh cyberpunk hacker aesthetic to the gameplay. This refresh includes improvements to tower designs and enemy visuals, enhancing the overall immersive experience.
- CTA: Check out the new look of Code Breach!
- Visual brief: A dynamic image showcasing the cyberpunk aesthetic of the Code Breach game, highlighting new tower designs and enemy visuals with a hacker-themed interface.
